content.speakerText: Thanks so much for your help!
expectedAnswers: You're welcome! Have a wonderful day!
No problem! Enjoy the toy with your little one!
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否恰当回应了感谢
语言准确性：语法和用词是否正确
表达自然度：是否符合英语母语者日常口语习惯
关键词覆盖：是否使用了场景关键词如 'welcome', 'enjoy', 'come back'

content.speakerText: I'll be back next week for my kid's birthday!
content.speakerTextCn: 我下周还会来，给我孩子买生日礼物！
expectedAnswers: That's awesome! We'll have some new birthday toys ready!
Great! Tell your little one we're saving a special gift for them!
Looking forward to seeing you again! Happy birthday to your child!
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否积极回应未来计划并表达期待
语言准确性：时态、动词和搭配是否正确
表达自然度：是否使用了亲切、口语化的表达
关键词覆盖：是否使用了 'birthday', 'back', 'new stuff', 'kid' 等场景词

content.speakerText: I'm all set! Have a wonderful day!
content.speakerTextCn: 我准备好了！祝你今天愉快！
expectedAnswers: You too! Thanks for shopping with us!
Thank you! We hope to see you again soon!
Have a great one! And say hi to your little one for me!
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否礼貌回应道别并传递友好信息
语言准确性：句型结构和用词是否得体
表达自然度：是否符合英语母语者在零售场景中的自然语调
关键词覆盖：是否使用了 'have a great day', 'see you again', 'thank you' 等道别高频词
